question.label: Recent friction
question.name: What has been the most frustrating part of the work lately?
question.description: Lets him name the current friction without assuming the source.

answer: I feel better when feedback is specific and close to the work.

assessment.note: He says specific, in-the-work feedback helps him feel better, which implies that support is currently missing and that clearer feedback improves things.

new_queue.name: What keeps getting reprioritized in a way that changes your design work?

new_queue.name: What would help most from me right now?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I feel better when feedback is specific and close to the work.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
I do ask for help sometimes, but I worry about sounding slow.
